subcodes.first_line: O God! In the Sacred Books and Scriptures, revealed through Thy Messengers, Thou gave the Israelites the glad-tidings and the promise that the day would come when despondent Jews would prosper
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار در کتب و صحف بواسطه انبیا اخبار فرموده ای و اسراایل را بشارت
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @chastisement and requital, @sacred remains; burial of the Bab
